g.text: 01 / ZERO-TRUST EDR
Designed a 5D behavioural risk-scoring model to detect state-sponsored APTs targeting DRDO.
Achieved 97.5% detection accuracy and 2.0% false-positive rate across 200 attack scenarios.
C++ · REACT.JS · TYPESCRIPT · CYBER SECURITY · RESEARCH PAPER
02 / COGNIHELM
Engineered a retrofittable embedded safety system with alcohol interlock and crash detection.
Built a 4-level priority-interrupt firmware stack delivering crash-response latency under 300 ms.
ESP32 · FREERTOS · MQTT · EMBEDDED SYSTEMS · RESEARCH PAPER
03 / AI COMPANION AGENT
Built a viral full-stack AI agent implementing contextual memory and emotion sentiment detection.
Scaled to 70,000+ users in 24 hours, optimizing cold-start latency via edge function deployment.
NEXT.JS · ANTHROPIC API · EDGE FUNCTIONS
04 / LUMA SPACE PLATFORM
Built a complete D2C e-commerce tech stack independently with a serverless AWS backend.
Scaled to 5,000+ active users and implemented marketing automation and analytics dashboards.
AWS LAMBDA · NODE.JS · E-COMMERCE · ANALYTICS
05 / SENTIAID
Architected an AI-powered sign language translator using NLP and custom neural networks.
Processed 60,000+ words with Named Entity Recognition and deployed real-time REST APIs.
NLP · NEURAL NETWORKS · PYTHON · REST APIS
06 / MYFINPORTFOLIO
Architected production-ready features for web applications serving real-time FinTech data.
Optimised critical database queries, reducing latency on high-frequency financial data reads.
REACT.JS · NODE.JS · EXPRESS · FINTECH
07 / PGFY FRONTEND
Developed the flagship product frontend focusing on responsive UI architecture and component reusability.
Reduced page load time through lazy loading and memoisation strategies across the codebase.
REACT.JS · GIT/GITHUB · AGILE · FRONTEND
08 / FRAUDSHIELD API
Designed a fraud-detection API side project to identify anomalies in transaction pipelines.
Motivated by real-world financial transaction pipeline patterns observed during FinTech internship.
FINTECH · API DEVELOPMENT · FRAUD DETECTION
09 / OUTLIER LLM EVALUATION
Evaluated and refined outputs of large language models using RLHF across advanced STEM domains.
Engineered prompts across 10+ parameter configurations to benchmark instruction-following and accuracy.
RLHF · PROMPT ENGINEERING · STEM · AI QA
10 / FINANCIAL DATA PIPELINE
Built data cleaning, validation, and transformation pipelines in Python and Excel.
Designed Power BI dashboards to visualise key financial metrics and surface actionable insights.
PYTHON · PANDAS · POWER BI · EXCEL
11 / EDR SIMULATION ENGINE
Shipped a live simulation on Vercel for the Zero-Trust EDR risk-scoring model.
Tested 200 attack scenarios including SideCopy APT, Babuk Locker 2.0, and C2 exfiltration.
REACT.JS · VERCEL · SIMULATION · CYBER SECURITY
12 / CYBER THREAT RESPONSE
Worked on active cyber threat response and digital forensics for the UP Police program.
Gained hands-on exposure to cyber crime investigation workflows and evidence handling.
DIGITAL FORENSICS · INCIDENT RESPONSE · SECURITY
13 / AI QUALITY ASSURANCE
Evaluated and rated content to inform AI model training for leading technology companies.
Analyzed complex data to provide insights for the continuous improvement of rating frameworks.
AI MODEL TRAINING · DATA ANALYSIS · QA
14 / SUPPLY CHAIN OPTIMIZATION
Implemented structured inventory management and demand planning practices for an FMCG business.
Contributed to a ~30% reduction in operational inefficiencies through process improvement.
OPERATIONS · INVENTORY CONTROL · DATA ANALYSIS
15 / POST-QUANTUM CRYPTO
Integrated post-quantum cryptographic defences into a threat detection framework.
Leveraged CRYSTALS-Kyber / FIPS 203 and BB84 QKD to secure communications against future threats.
CRYSTALS-KYBER · BB84 QKD · CRYPTOGRAPHY
